channel.title: Data Protection on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Data Protection on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: k8s: Spotlight on SIG Storage
item.description:
SIG Storage discusses its role in Kubernetes persistent storage, including CSI/COSI, data protection, and emerging work for AI workloads. Recent updates include VolumeGroupSnapshot GA in v1.36, CSI Changed Block Tracking Beta in v1.36, and VolumeAttributesClass GA in v1.34.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure NetApp Files enable backup by default
item.description:
Azure NetApp Files now enables backup by default for newly created volumes in public preview. Backups are provisioned automatically at volume creation to simplify setup and improve data protection.

  • Source: Azure Updates
